description: 6-station warehouse outbound - per-server DEVS for stream-synchronized equivalence

internal_transitions.condition: queue_count > 1 and srv_2_free == 0 and srv_3_free == 0 and srv_4_free == 1
queue_count > 1 and srv_2_free == 0 and srv_3_free == 0 and srv_4_free == 0

external_transitions.condition: srv_1_free == 0 and srv_2_free == 0 and srv_3_free == 0 and srv_4_free == 1
srv_1_free == 0 and srv_2_free == 0 and srv_3_free == 0 and srv_4_free == 0
